---
title: "Releases"
description: "Download current and previous versions of OutbreakTools"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

library(fs)
library(glue)

repo_base <- "https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/main/releases"

# --- Latest release (main branch only) ---

latest_zip <- here::here("releases", "latest", "OBT-main-latest.zip")

cat("## Latest release\n\n")
cat("Download the most recent stable version of OutbreakTools.\n\n")

if (file_exists(latest_zip)) {
  url <- glue("{repo_base}/latest/OBT-main-latest.zip")
  cat(glue(
    '::: {{.callout-tip appearance="simple"}}\n',
    '**Main (stable)** --- [OBT-main-latest.zip]({url}){{target="_blank"}}\n',
    ':::\n\n'
  ))
}

# --- Previous releases (dev branch only) ---

old_dir <- here::here("releases", "old")

dev_zips <- dir_ls(old_dir, glob = "*.zip") |>
  path_file() |>
  grep("^OBT-dev-", x = _, value = TRUE) |>
  sort(decreasing = TRUE)

format_release_row <- function(z) {
  rel_date <- regmatches(z, regexpr("\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}", z))
  url <- glue("{repo_base}/old/{z}")
  glue("| {rel_date} | [{z}]({url}){{target=\"_blank\"}} |")
}

cat("## Previous releases (dev branch)\n\n")

if (length(dev_zips) > 0) {
  cat("| Date | Download |\n")
  cat("|------|----------|\n")
  for (z in dev_zips) {
    cat(format_release_row(z), "\n")
  }
  cat("\n")
}
```

::: {.callout-note}
Each archive contains a **designer**, a **setup**, and a **ribbon template** file (`.xlsb`). See [Obtain OutbreakTools files](getting_started/download.qmd) for installation instructions.
:::
